nodes.text: Grub. Good. You're awake.
The King has been missing for three moons. Three expeditions into Blackfang Mountain. None returned.
I need someone... but look at you. You clean floors. You sweep gutters.
Ah, forget it. I'm sending you to Shaman Zog. If anyone knows what to do with you, it's him.
Still here? The King won't rescue himself.
Why are you carrying a broom?! Put that down and see Shaman Zog.
Zog spoke to you? Good. The Mushroom Woods entrance is east of the village.
Find a way across the broken bridge. That's your first test.
Good, you found the rope. The bridge in Mushroom Woods needs it.
You crossed the bridge? Hmph. Maybe you're not completely useless.
Watchtower is north through the woods. Professor Squig lives at the top. He might have something useful.
That gear looks important. Squig at the Watchtower is always tinkering with things.
The lift works? Then the marsh is open to you. Be careful near the witch's hut.
You made it through the marsh. That's more than most could do.
Blackfang Mountain looms to the north. Old Miner Moss knows the entrance.
Three ancient relics... You might actually be the one after all.
Find the locked shrine in the mountain ruins. That's where the path to the King begins.
The path is open? Then go. Find our King.
And Grub? Come back alive. That's an order.
You... you actually did it.
You found the King. You brought him home. You brought back the Crown.
I was wrong about you, Grub. We all were. Welcome home, hero.
